inputContent.inputPrompt: A dimly lit jazz club with a single spotlight on a saxophone player

Distant, warm amber table lamps provide a subtle, soft fill. The entire scene embodies a classic 1950s film noir aesthetic, characterized by rich, crushed blacks, desaturated cool blues in the background, and the warm glow of the spotlight. The textured fabric of his suit, the glint off his fedora, and the weathered wood of the stage are rendered with sharp detail. Shot on 16mm Kodak film stock, the image exhibits fine grain and subtle soft halation around the highlights, enhancing the vintage feel. This is a single continuous shot, ensuring fluid motion and consistent geometry
